case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. SHARON HAWLEY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HAWLEY, SHARON DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-08-2007 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SHARON HAWLEY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. SHARON HAWLEY HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF SHARON HAWLEY ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk K. Shaw, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Cheryl Lewis, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Cindy Lee representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Sharon Hawley is present.
J.R. Gabbard representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.
